title: Switch 2 Processor Analysed, GTA 6 'Gameplay', RTX 5060 Controversy
summary: Switch 2 mysteries are finally resolved as two independent analyses confirm an 8nm processor... with a twist. Meanwhile, Rich, Alex and Oliver debate the meaning of 'gameplay' with regards to Grand Theft Auto 6, Trailer 2 while the team compares notes on the Asus ROG Ally 2, Xbox Project Kennan leaks. Oliver stacks up Switch 2 Final Fantasy 7 Remake footage against the PS5 performance mode, while Nvidia's plan to launch RTX 5060 without any accompanying reviews does not go down particularly well with the team.  0:00:00 Introduction  0:01:09 News 1: Switch 2 SoC examined under a microscope!  0:22:00 News 2: Rockstar claims GTA 6 trailer is half gameplay 0:40:06 News 3: ROG Ally 2 and Project Kennan handhelds leak  0:53:15 News 4: New FF7 Remake Switch 2 footage analyzed!  1:05:24 News 5: Nvidia holding back RTX 5060 drivers until launch  1:22:56 Supporter Q1: Should AMD continue to work on FSR 3? Will we get FSR 4 quality upscaling in GTA 6 on PS5 Pro? 1:28:04 Supporter Q2: Could we get a Switch 2 version of GTA 6?  1:35:01 Supporter Q3: How will GTA 6 scale to Series S?  1:42:18 Supporter Q4: What do you think of viewers using DF Direct as a sleeping aid? title: What’s Wrong with the Commander Brackets? | 671
summary: Commander Brackets: It’s the new WotC-led deck classification system that’s taking the format by storm! But wait-- they’re in BETA! So what’s keeping Commander Brackets from being a complete and final product?  In this episode, Jimmy and Rachel sit down to discuss this question and many more in-depth. Do brackets work well as-is? What issues need to be ironed out? How do we make sure the rules are clear and useful? Time to jump in and find out! -------- Support the show and become a Patron!
